title: Urban Tracker Datatype Schema
description: JSON schema for validating RDL Urban Tracker datatype definitions

datatype.title: Data Type Definition
datatype.description: Definition of a data type including its metadata, requirements, and relationships to standards

id.description: Unique identifier for the data type (format: dt-{number})

name.description: Human-readable name of the data type

description.description: Detailed description of what the data type represents

category.description: Thematic category that this data type belongs to

rdls_coverage.description: Indication of how this data type relates to RDLS coverage

rdls_component.description: The RDLS component that this data type maps to

requirements.description: Technical specifications and field requirements for the data type

inspire_spec.description: Reference to the applicable INSPIRE specification (or N/A / Multiple if not directly applicable)

example_dataset.description: Name or description of a representative example dataset

example_url.description: URL reference to the example dataset or data source

reviewed.description: Indicates whether this data type has been reviewed
